name: studybuddy-career-copilot
description: AI Career Copilot monorepo scaffold for StudyBuddy.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @studybuddy/web" "npm run dev --workspace @studybuddy/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @studybuddy/shared && npm run build --workspace @studybuddy/api && npm run build --workspace @studybuddy/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @studybuddy/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @studybuddy/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @studybuddy/web
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace @studybuddy/shared && npm run clean --workspace @studybuddy/api && npm run clean --workspace @studybuddy/web
